## Summary

What changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test/fixture update

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate -- <spec>` passed
- [ ] `npm run overseer -- <spec>` passed (or expected fail documented)
- [ ] Relevant regression fixtures run

## Files Updated

List key files and expected behavior changes.

## Changelog

- [ ] Updated `logs/changes.md`

## Notes

Any migration or backward-compatibility notes.
